en_title: God of War Laufey Physical Disc Release Confirmed, Suggesting 2027 Launch
cn_title: 《战神：劳菲》确认推出实体版，或暗示2027年发售
subtitle: 实体版保住了
opus_summary: 圣莫妮卡工作室确认《战神：Laufey》将推出实体光盘版，暗示游戏可能在2027年发售。作品尚未公布具体日期，但已在2026年State of Play亮相，传闻发售窗口为2027年2月或3月。

paragraphs.en: Santa Monica Studio has confirmed God of War Laufey will "be available on a physical disc," suggesting its launch will arrive in 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 圣莫妮卡工作室确认《战神：Laufey》将「提供实体光盘版」，暗示游戏可能在2027年发售。

paragraphs.en: The PlayStation studio announced the news with a post on its X/Twitter account. When replying to its post revealing that it would show up to talk about God of War Laufey at San Diego Comic-Con 2026, it told fans fearing an all-digital launch that they have nothing to worry about.
paragraphs.cn: 这家PlayStation工作室在X账号发帖宣布了消息。工作室此前发帖透露将出席2026年圣迭戈动漫展，讨论《战神：Laufey》；在回复该帖时，它告诉担心游戏只推出数字版的粉丝不必忧虑。

paragraphs.en: "We can confirm God of War Laufey will be available on disc," Santa Monica Studio said.
paragraphs.cn: 圣莫妮卡工作室表示：「我们可以确认，《战神：Laufey》将推出光盘版。」

paragraphs.en: We can confirm God of War Laufey will be available on disc.
paragraphs.cn: 我们可以确认，《战神：Laufey》将推出光盘版。

paragraphs.en: It's a one-sentence announcement that God of War fans have already begun latching onto for two reasons. First and foremost is that it confirms the Deborah Ann Woll-starring video game will be available for purchase on a disc following the news that Sony would cease production for new physical games starting in January 2028 . An ocean of players have already made their disappointment with the decision clear , but they can rest assured that at least this PlayStation exclusive won't be locked to a digital-only release.
paragraphs.cn: 这条一句话公告引起了《战神》粉丝的关注，原因有二。首先，在索尼宣布从2028年1月起停止生产新实体游戏后，它确认了由Deborah Ann Woll主演的这款游戏将提供光盘购买版本。大量玩家已经明确表达了对该决定的失望，但至少可以放心，这款PlayStation独占游戏不会被锁定为纯数字发行。

paragraphs.en: Some of the concern that God of War Laufey wouldn't get a physical release comes from the fact that the Santa Monica Studio game has yet to receive a release date or window. Rockstar Games, meanwhile, also recently confirmed that . With disc production for new PlayStation games set to end in January 2028, it now appears the developers are planning for its launch to arrive at least before 2027 ends.
paragraphs.cn: 人们担心《战神：Laufey》不推出实体版，部分原因在于这款圣莫妮卡工作室游戏尚未公布发售日期或窗口。与此同时，Rockstar Games近期也确认了相关消息。随着新PlayStation游戏的光盘生产将于2028年1月结束，如今看来，开发者计划至少在2027年结束前推出本作。

paragraphs.en: God of War Laufey was announced during Sony's June 2026 State of Play presentation. This non-prequel tale follows Faye/Laufey through a journey in the afterlife, with its reveal coming with loads of gameplay and story moments to keep players occupied until release. With so much already shown and rumors that Santa Monica Studio is planning for a February or March 2027 launch, it makes sense that the developers are confident enough to confirm a physical release now.
paragraphs.cn: 《战神：Laufey》在索尼2026年6月的State of Play发布会上公布。这段非前传故事讲述Faye/Laufey在死后世界的旅程；公布时展示了大量玩法和剧情内容，足以让玩家等待发售。鉴于目前已经展示了这么多内容，加上有传闻称圣莫妮卡工作室计划在2027年2月或3月发售，开发者如今有信心确认实体版也就合情合理了。

paragraphs.en: For now, however, God of War Laufey has no firm release date. In the meantime, you can check out IGN's exclusive interview with the team. You can also see Woll recount the time she was first told about the game back in 2018 .
paragraphs.cn: 不过目前《战神：Laufey》仍没有确定发售日期。在此期间，可以查看IGN对开发团队的独家采访，也可以观看Woll讲述自己早在2018年首次得知这款游戏时的经历。
